params.isStable: true = stableETH pool, false = upETH pool.
params.minPricePerToken: Pool-wide minimum price at SCALE=1e6 precision.
params.quoteToken: The confidential quote token accepted by the pool (e.g. cUSDC).

merge(uint256,uint64,bytes32).details: User must have pre-approved this contract for both tokens.

redeem(uint256,uint64).details: Payout = (balance * payoutRate) / SCALE, computed fully in FHE.

params.oraclePrice: ETH price in USD (same units as strike, e.g. 3000 means $3000).

params.maturity: Unix timestamp of maturity (public, defines series).

authorizeBridge(uint256,uint64).notice: Authorize the bridge to burn tokens for a specific series.         Call once per series after deploying the bridge.

createPool(uint256,uint64,bool,address,u.notice: Deploy a minimal-proxy SeriesPool clone for one token side of a series.

createSeries(uint256,uint64).notice: Deploy a new stableETH/upETH pair for the given (strike, maturity).

merge(uint256,uint64,bytes32).notice: User burns equal encrypted amounts of both tokens to reclaim cWETH.

redeem(uint256,uint64).notice: User redeems stableETH and/or upETH for cWETH after settlement.

setMatchingEngine(address).notice: Register the ConfidentialMatchingEngine so it is authorized on every token pair.

setPoolImplementation(address).notice: Set the SeriesPool implementation contract for clone deployment.

settle(uint256,uint64,uint256).notice: Called by oracle after maturity to set payout ratios.

split(uint256,uint64,bytes32,bytes).notice: User locks encrypted cWETH and receives equal stableETH + upETH.
